name: shanghai-rave-index
description: Interactive Shanghai Rave Index for 2026 techno and rave events.

scripts.check: node --check scripts/check.js && node --check scripts/scrape-events.js && node --check scripts/audit-events.js && node --check scripts/generate-seo-pages.js && node --check scripts/generate-poster-archive.js && node --check assets/poster-archive.js && node scripts/check.js && node scripts/audit-events.js
